_comment_strategy: ALL OPENCODE-GO STRATEGY
Every agent and category uses opencode-go models exclusively.
No GitHub Copilot dependency — fully portable across providers.
MODEL TIERS (opencode-go)
Tier 1 (flagship reasoning):    deepseek-v4-pro, qwen3.7-max, kimi-k2.6, glm-5.1, minimax-m3
Tier 2 (quality balanced):      kimi-k2.5, qwen3.6-plus, qwen3.7-plus, mimo-v2.5-pro
Tier 3 (fast/cheap/abundant):   qwen3.5-plus (10,200 req/5hr), deepseek-v4-flash (31,650 req/5hr)
Tier 4 (utility/specialized):   minimax-m2.5, minimax-m2.7, mimo-v2.5, glm-5
AGENT GROUPS → MODEL MAPPING
Claude-native (Sisyphus, Prometheus, Metis):   deepseek-v4-pro, kimi-k2.5/6, glm-5.1
GPT-native   (Hephaestus, Oracle, Momus):      kimi-k2.6, qwen3.7-max, deepseek-v4-pro
Dual-prompt  (Atlas, Sisyphus-Junior):          mimo-v2.5/2.5-pro, qwen3.5-plus
Utility/speed (Explore, Librarian, Looker):    qwen3.5-plus, deepseek-v4-flash, minimax-m2.5/7
KEY MODEL STRENGTHS (from Apr-Jun 2026 benchmarks)
deepseek-v4-pro:  Best coding accuracy (80.6% SWE-Bench Verified), 1M context, strong reasoning ($0.435/$0.87 per 1M — permanent pricing)
qwen3.7-max:      Strongest pure reasoning (GPQA Diamond 92.4, SWE-Bench Pro 60.6%), 1M context, reasoning:true
qwen3.7-plus:     Multimodal (vision+video), 1M context, ~6x cheaper than Max ($0.40/$1.60), reasoning:true
kimi-k2.6:        Vision + multimodal, 300-agent swarm, SWE-Bench Pro 58.6%, best long-horizon agentic
glm-5.1:          Long-horizon agentic (thousands of tool calls), SWE-Bench Pro 58.4%, MIT license
minimax-m3:       Frontier coding (59% SWE-Bench Pro), 1M context, multimodal, BrowseComp 83.5
mimo-v2.5-pro:    Creative/vision, compiler from scratch in 4.4hr, AA Intelligence 54
qwen3.5-plus:     Cheapest with reasoning, 10,200 req/5hr — ideal for utility/quick tasks
deepseek-v4-flash: Ultra-cheap, 31,650 req/5hr — burn almost no quota

sisyphus._comment: Main orchestrator. Claude-native 1100-line prompt. deepseek-v4-pro has best instruction-following + coding accuracy (80.6% SWE-Bench Verified) + 1M context for long orchestrator prompts. kimi-k2.6 (vision, agentic swarm) as first fallback.

hephaestus._comment: Autonomous deep worker. kimi-k2.6 excels at long-horizon agentic work (300-agent swarm primitive, 12+ hr autonomous runs, 4000+ tool calls). deepseek-v4-pro (best single-shot coding, 1M context) as fallback. No GPT-codex available on opencode-go.

oracle._comment: Read-only high-IQ consultant. Maximum reasoning needed. qwen3.7-max has strongest pure reasoning (GPQA Diamond 92.4, SWE-Bench Pro 60.6%) with reasoning:true support. deepseek-v4-pro (80.6% SWE-Bench Verified) and kimi-k2.6 (HLE 54% with tools) as fallbacks.

librarian._comment: Docs + OSS search. Speed matters, not depth. qwen3.5-plus (10,200 req/5hr) is cheap, fast, and capable. deepseek-v4-flash (31,650 req/5hr) as nearly-unlimited fallback.

explore._comment: Fast codebase grep. Needs speed + massive quota. deepseek-v4-flash (31,650 req/5hr) is the fastest cheapest option. qwen3.5-plus as quality-fallback.

multimodal-looker._comment: Vision + screenshot analysis. minimax-m3 is the best multimodal opencode-go model (59% SWE-Bench Pro, native vision+video, 1M context, BrowseComp 83.5). kimi-k2.6 also multimodal as quality fallback.

prometheus._comment: Strategic planner. Claude-native interview-style prompt (~1100 lines). kimi-k2.5 (vision-capable, strong planning, cheaper than k2.6) as primary. kimi-k2.6 as upgraded fallback. deepseek-v4-pro (1M context for long plans) as secondary.

metis._comment: Gap analyzer — catches what Prometheus missed. deepseek-v4-pro provides strong reasoning + 1M context (can read full plans). mimo-v2.5-pro (high quality analysis) as fallback. qwen3.6-plus as quick balanced option.

momus._comment: Ruthless plan reviewer. qwen3.7-max with xhigh reasoning has strongest pure reasoning for quality-gating execution. deepseek-v4-pro (best coding reasoning) as fallback. kimi-k2.6 (vision for reviewing diagrams/UIs).

atlas._comment: Executes Prometheus plans. Structured checklist execution. mimo-v2.5 is efficient for structured task execution. mimo-v2.5-pro for higher quality. kimi-k2.5 for longer execution chains.

sisyphus-junior._comment: Lightweight executor for spawned category tasks. qwen3.5-plus (10,200 req/5hr) and deepseek-v4-flash (31,650 req/5hr) burn almost no quota. minimax-m2.5 as tertiary.

visual-engineering._comment: UI/frontend tasks — needs vision + coding quality. minimax-m3 is the best multimodal opencode-go model (native vision+video, 59% SWE-Bench Pro, 1M context). kimi-k2.6 also strong for visual work. qwen3.7-plus adds cheap multimodal.

ultrabrain._comment: Highest reasoning tasks (architecture, security, complex debugging). qwen3.7-max has strongest pure reasoning (GPQA Diamond 92.4). deepseek-v4-pro (best coding reasoning) and kimi-k2.6 (strong agentic reasoning) as fallbacks.

deep._comment: Deep autonomous coding tasks. kimi-k2.6 excels at long-horizon agentic work (300-agent swarm, 12+ hr runs). deepseek-v4-pro (best single-shot coding, 1M context) and glm-5.1 (thousands-of-tool-call sustained sessions) as fallbacks.

artistry._comment: Creative/design tasks. mimo-v2.5-pro (vision capable, creative strength, AA Intelligence 54) for unconventional approaches. kimi-k2.6 (vision + emotional intelligence) and minimax-m3 (multimodal + coding) as fallbacks.

quick._comment: Trivial spawned tasks. qwen3.5-plus = 10,200 req/5hr (highest reasoning-enabled quota). deepseek-v4-flash = 31,650 req/5hr (virtually unlimited). minimax-m2.7 as tertiary fast option.

unspecified-low._comment: Moderate tasks, unclassified. deepseek-v4-pro: best quality-for-quota balance (3,450 req/5hr, 80.6% SWE-Bench Verified). kimi-k2.5 and qwen3.6-plus as cheaper fallbacks.

unspecified-high._comment: Complex unclassified tasks. kimi-k2.6: vision-capable, best agentic quality in opencode-go, handles complex nested work. deepseek-v4-pro (1M context) and qwen3.7-max (strongest reasoning) as fallbacks.

writing._comment: Documentation, prose, technical writing. qwen3.7-plus: multimodal (can reference screenshots), 1M context, ~6x cheaper than Max, strong writing. qwen3.5-plus as fast cheap fallback. kimi-k2.5 for quality prose.

visual-engineering._comment: UI/frontend tasks — needs vision + coding quality. minimax-m3: native multimodal (vision+video), 1M context, 59% SWE-Bench Pro, BrowseComp 83.5%. kimi-k2.6 (vision+agentic) and qwen3.7-plus (vision+cheap) as fallbacks.

ultrabrain._comment: Highest reasoning tasks (architecture, security, complex debugging). qwen3.7-max: GPQA Diamond 92.4, SWE-Bench Pro 60.6%, strongest pure reasoning in opencode-go. deepseek-v4-pro (best coding reasoning) and kimi-k2.6 (HLE 54% w/ tools) as fallbacks.

deep._comment: Deep autonomous coding tasks. deepseek-v4-pro: best coding accuracy (80.6% SWE-Bench Verified), 1M context for long autonomous sessions. glm-5.1 (sustained 1000+ tool call sessions) and kimi-k2.6 (swarm) as fallbacks.

artistry._comment: Creative/design tasks. mimo-v2.5-pro: vision-capable, excels at creative/unconventional work. kimi-k2.6 (multimodal, strong prose) and minimax-m3 (frontier coding+vision) as fallbacks.

quick._comment: Trivial spawned tasks. qwen3.5-plus (10,200 req/5hr) + deepseek-v4-flash (31,650 req/5hr) — together these two can handle unlimited quick tasks. minimax-m2.7 as tertiary.

unspecified-low._comment: Moderate tasks, unclassified. deepseek-v4-pro: best quality-for-quota balance in opencode-go (3,450 req/5hr). kimi-k2.5 (strong coding) and qwen3.6-plus (balanced) as fallbacks.

unspecified-high._comment: Complex unclassified tasks. kimi-k2.6: vision-capable (can handle screenshots), strong agentic quality (58.6% SWE-Bench Pro), 300-agent swarm for complex decomposition. deepseek-v4-pro and qwen3.7-max as high-quality fallbacks.

writing._comment: Documentation, prose, technical writing. qwen3.7-plus: multimodal (can read screenshots of docs), 1M context, cheapest frontier-tier model ($0.40/$1.60 per 1M), strong prose. qwen3.5-plus (cheaper) and kimi-k2.5 (good prose) as fallbacks.
